---
title: "geracao_energia_eletrica"
author: "Fernando Almeida Barbalho"
date: "2026-04-15"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
library(tidyverse)

yearly_full_release_long_format <- 
  read_csv("yearly_full_release_long_format.csv") %>%
  janitor::clean_names()

theme_vpr<- function(paleta_cores){
  
  theme_light() +
    theme(
      panel.background = element_rect(fill= paleta_cores$cor_fundo_painel),
      panel.grid = element_blank(),
      legend.position = "right",
      legend.background = element_rect(fill= paleta_cores$cor_fundo, color = paleta_cores$cor_fundo),
      #legend.title = element_blank(),
      legend.text = element_text(size = 8),
      plot.background = element_rect(fill =paleta_cores$cor_fundo ),
      plot.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 10, face = "italic"),
      text = element_text( colour = paleta_cores$cor_texto),
      strip.background = element_rect(fill = paleta_cores$cor_fundo  ),
      strip.text = element_text(size= 9, face ="bold", color = paleta_cores$cor_texto)
    )  
  
  
}


paleta_cores<- list(  cor_fundo= "#D0D0D0", # "#E0E0E0", # # "#F8F8F8",
                      
                      cor_fundo_painel = "#F5F5F5",
                      
                      cor_fundo_estados = "#696969",
                      
                      cor_fundo_mapa_pontos = "#2B2B2B", #"#505050"
                      
                      cor_texto = "#324e5a"
)

```

## R Markdown

This is an R Markdown document. Markdown is a simple formatting syntax for authoring HTML, PDF, and MS Word documents. For more details on using R Markdown see <http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com>.

When you click the **Knit** button a document will be generated that includes both content as well as the output of any embedded R code chunks within the document. You can embed an R code chunk like this:

```{r fig.dpi= 300}






dados_graficos_dispersao_ee<-
  yearly_full_release_long_format %>%
  filter(category %in% c("Electricity generation", "Power sector emissions")  ,
         subcategory == "Aggregate fuel",
         variable %in% c("Clean", "Fossil"),
         year == 2025,
         !is.na(iso_3_code),
         unit %in% c("TWh", "mtCO2")) %>%
  select(iso_3_code, variable, category, value) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = c(category, variable) ,
              values_from = value,
              names_sep = "-") %>%
  janitor::clean_names() %>%
  mutate(emission_per_mwh_clean = power_sector_emissions_clean/electricity_generation_clean,
         emission_per_mwh_fossil = power_sector_emissions_fossil/electricity_generation_fossil)

dados_graficos_dispersao_ee %>%
  ggplot(aes(emission_per_mwh_clean, power_sector_emissions_fossil)) +
  geom_point()

```
